headline: Wex (WEX) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: Wex (WEX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +3.75% and +0.92%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
